layout.title: Welcome to GoClaw
layout.subtitle: Three quick steps to get your first agent running

provider.title: Connect an LLM provider
provider.subtitle: Pick a provider type and paste its API key. You can add more later.

model.title: Choose a model
model.subtitle: Models exposed by {{provider}}.
model.empty: This provider didn't return any models. You can still continue and pick one later from the agent page.

agent.title: Create your first agent
agent.subtitle: Give it a name and a short description. You can tune everything after setup.

complete.title: You're all set
complete.subtitle: Your provider and agent are configured. You can manage them anytime from the dashboard.
